items.title: Symptom vs cause — RSS to per-allocation
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB RSS["RSS / OOM
(symptom)"] --> Q{"Is it growing?"} Q -- yes (leak) --> Leak["tracemalloc snapshots + compare_to
memray --leaks"] Q -- no (steady fat) --> Fat["tracemalloc / memray flamegraph
(largest allocations)"] Leak --> Fix["Find leak site → drop reference / cache"] Fat --> Fix2["Change representation / batch size / mmap"]
items.caption: Workflow: symptom (RSS) → ask if growing → leak hunt or fat hunt → fix.

items.title: tracemalloc snapshot model
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Start["tracemalloc.start()"] --> S1["snapshot 1 (before)"]
  S1 --> Op["do_one_iteration()"]
  Op --> S2["snapshot 2 (after)"]
  S2 --> Diff["snapshot2.compare_to(snapshot1)"]
  Diff --> Top["top-N grew-most lines = leak suspects"]
items.caption: tracemalloc gives you snapshots and diffs; the diff is what finds leaks.
